agent.status: Building automated coverage for how a game comes together. The test story now walks a game forming from scratch — people show interest, someone suggests a spot, players commit, it gets scheduled — plus the case where too few commit and it fizzles. It all shows up in the visual test report so you can watch each step happen.
agent.direction: Next: the same kind of coverage for the weekly game-night poll (enough people in → game's on, too few → skip this week).
